subject: Release MSB discovery 1.2.6 docker
commit_message:
Release MSB discovery 1.2.6 docker

Issue-ID: MSB-456
Signed-off-by: Huabing Zhao <zhao.huabing@zte.com.cn>
Change-Id: I0c2df32ead7254d0b243d5120afed66e78785045

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> > Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1
> > 
> > I believe this is a "staging" version of MSB so -1 while waiting for the released version
> > MSB HC are OK.
> > Is there an E2E automated case which uses MSB?
> 
No individual E2E test for MSB, but should be covered by other E2E tests since MSB is used for inter-services communication by ONAP components such as MultiCloud, AAI and VF-C. There're some integration tests here: workspace/onap/csit/tests/msb/

I'll continue the release process and submit a patch set to reflect the released version later.
